steps.title: Find probability for room C
steps.content:
• The probabilities for all rooms must sum to 1.
  • $$P(C)=1-P(A)-P(B)=1-0.68-0.24$$
  • $$P(C)=0.08$$

steps.title: Convert probability to count
steps.content:
• Multiply the probability for room C by total visitors.
  • $$0.08 \times 275 = 22$$
  • Thus 22 visitors are in room C.
  • That matches choice B — B is correct.
